sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34076" key="e)mbruoto/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβρῠο-τόμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n34076.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for cutting up the foetus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.63</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
